backstory.original: Raised by the thieves' guild in Calimport, Artemis Entreri has since become one of the deadliest and most feared assassins in the history of Faerûn. Entreri is completely devoted to mastery of his craft, leaving no room in his life for emotional attachment or even personal pleasures. His fighting skills and tactical brilliance are equalled only by one other - the drow warrior Drizzt Do'Urden.
backstory.display: 阿尔忒弥斯·恩崔立在卡林港的盗贼公会长大，从此成为费伦历史上最为致命和令人恐惧的刺客之一。恩崔立彻底致力于掌握自身技艺，在他的生活中，没有给情感甚至个人乐趣留下空间。他的战斗技艺和战术智慧只有一个人可以与之媲美--卓尔精灵崔斯特·杜垩登。

description.original: Artemis attacks the nearest enemy with his Vampiric Dagger.
description.display: 阿尔忒弥斯用他的吸血匕首攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Artemis shows off his martial prowess, leaping out to attack whenever someone else does.
description.display: 阿尔忒弥斯展现自己的武艺本领，在其他人攻击的同时跳起发动攻击。

longDescription.original: For 30 seconds, Artemis concentrates on showing off his martial prowess, increasing his base damage by 300% for each DPS Champion in the formation (including himself), stacking multiplicatively. Artemis' base attack cooldown also completes whenever another DPS Champion attacks.
longDescription.display: 在 30 秒内，阿尔忒弥斯会集中注意力展现自己的武艺本领，阵型中每有一位输出型勇士（包含他自己），他的基础伤害就提升 300%，以乘算方式叠加。只要其他输出型勇士发动攻击，阿尔忒弥斯的基本攻击也会同时完成冷却。

description.original: Artemis observes and duplicates a portion of formational abilities affecting other DPS Champions in the formation. You'll need a unique formation to take advantage of this.
description.display: 阿尔忒弥斯观察并复制一部分影响其他输出型勇士的阵型技能。你需要构建独特的阵型才能利用此优势。

description.desc: Artemis observes and copies the positional formation abilities applied to other DPS Champions in the formation and gains a copy of those abilities on himself at $(amount)% of their effectiveness, even if he himself already receives that effect.
阿尔忒弥斯观察并复制施加给阵型中其他伤害输出勇士的阵型技能，将这些技能以 $(amount)% 的效果应用于自身，无论他是否已受到相关技能影响

tipText.original: Artemis observes and duplicates a portion of formational abilities affecting other DPS Champions in the formation. You'll need a unique formation to take advantage of this.
tipText.display: 阿尔忒弥斯观察并复制一部分影响其他输出型勇士的阵型技能。你需要构建独特的阵型才能利用此优势。

description.desc: Whenever Artemis kills an enemy, Artemis' damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% (multiplicatively). There is a $(chance)% chance per stack (additive) that Artemis' next attack deals $(extra)% more damage and resets the stack count.^$artemis_effect_description
阿尔忒弥斯每击杀一名敌人，即提高自身伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。每层堆叠有 $(chance)% 几率（加算）使阿尔忒弥斯的下一次攻击额外造成 $(extra)% 伤害，并重置堆叠层数^$artemis_effect_description

tipText.original: Artemis' power increases over time as he gets kills; this power gets unleashed randomly when he attacks.
tipText.display: 造成击杀时，阿尔忒弥斯的力量逐渐提高，并在他发动攻击时随机施放储存的力量。

description.desc: Observance's effect is increased by $(amount)% (multiplicatively) for positional formation ability observed and copied from Champions adjacent to Artemis.
阿尔忒弥斯每观察并复制一个相邻勇士身上的阵型技能，观察的效果就提升 $(amount)%（乘算）

specializationDescription.original: Artemis makes cautious friends with those around him, increasing the effect of abilities observed on them.
specializationDescription.display: 阿尔忒弥斯将身边的人视为朋友，提高从其身上观察得来的技能效果。

description.desc: Observance's effect is increased by $(amount)% (multiplicatively) for positional formation ability observed and copied from Drizzt Do'Urden or Catti-brie.
阿尔忒弥斯每观察并复制一个崔斯特·杜垩登或凯蒂布莉儿身上的阵型技能，观察的效果就提升 $(amount)%（乘算）

specializationDescription.original: Artemis has a keen eye for abilities copied from his lifelong nemesis, Drizzt Do'Urden and his tiresome band of companions.
specializationDescription.display: 阿尔忒弥斯善于利用他从宿敌崔斯特·杜垩登，以及他那群讨厌的伙伴身上复制得来的技能。

description.original: I'll turn them around so you can stab them. Go.
description.display: 我会把他们转过去，然后你可以捅他们。去吧。

description.original: Think you've trained enough? Look behind you.
description.display: 觉得你的训练足够了？看看你身后。

description.original: There's a reason I'm still alive.
description.display: 我之所以还能活着是有原因的。

description.original: As long as it doesn't talk to you, any blade will do.
description.display: 只要不会跟你说话，任何剑都可以。

description.original: Only one of us is walking away from this.
description.display: 我们中只有一人正在远离死亡。

description.original: Their last thoughts will dismiss me as just a shadow.
description.display: 在他们最后的念头里，我只是一个影子。

description.original: Your life essence belongs to me now.
description.display: 你的生命精华现在属于我了。

description.original: I need some healing - that bandit will do.
description.display: 我需要治疗——那个土匪就不错。

description.original: It's important in my line of work to know the right people for the right jobs.
description.display: 干我这一行，知道什么人适合做什么事很重要。

description.original: Death is part of every culture, every people. I've studied them all.
description.display: 死亡是每种文化，每个民族的一部分。我全都研究过。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Raised by the thieves' guild in Calimport, Artemis Entreri has since become one of the deadliest and most feared assassins in the history of Faerûn. Entreri is completely devoted to mastery of his craft, leaving no room in his life for emotional attachment or even personal pleasures. His fighting skills and tactical brilliance are equalled only by one other - the drow warrior Drizzt Do'Urden.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Artemis feeds off the power of other damage dealers, stealing their buffs in a neverending attempt to out-class them.

event_upgrades.name: Observance
event_upgrades.description: Artemis observes and duplicates a portion of formational abilities affecting other DPS Champions in the formation. You'll need a unique formation to take advantage of this.

character_sheet_details.system_description: 阿尔忒弥斯会吸取其他伤害输出者的力量，偷取他们的增益，无休止地尝试击败对方。
